summary: High‑quality audience recording featuring a strong first set with the rare Bird Song>Music>Might As Well combo; second set uneven with guest drummers and a disorganized Iko Iko.
review: The Miller‑upgraded audience (AUD) transfer is crisp and captures the unique Calypso‑flavored guest appearance, making it a solid listen. Musically the first set shines with tight playing and a standout Bird Song>Music>Might As Well sequence, while the second set feels hit‑or‑miss, hampered by an unrehearsed Iko Iko jam and mixed guest drumming.

ai_rating.rationale: Review rates the transfer 5 stars (excellent) and overall show 4 stars, balancing a strong first set with a weaker second set.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Excellent audience capture after Miller upgrade; no soundboard source but clear enough to enjoy the unique guest contributions.

standout_songs: Bird Song > Music > Might As Well
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set varied and strong; second set begins with guest drums leading to a disorganized Iko Iko jam and overall uneven performance.

band_member_comments.Drums: Neville drummers sit in with the Rhythm Devils, resulting in an unstructured drum jam that affects the second‑set flow.
